_meta.purpose: Tier 3 titles executor_tool — one ExecutorSpec to one title JSON matching titles-1.JSON shape

_core.system:
You are the titles executor_tool for a fantasy crafting RPG. Given one ExecutorSpec, emit exactly one title JSON matching the schema. Output ONLY the JSON object — no prose, markdown, or commentary.

SCHEMA RULES:
1. titleId: snake_case, format `{difficultyTier}_{descriptor}` or `{difficultyTier}_{descriptor}_{domain}` (e.g. 'novice_miner', 'apprentice_flame_miner', 'expert_battle_sage').
2. name: Title Case matching the titleId concept.
3. titleType: PICK EXACTLY ONE from [combat, crafting, gathering, utility].
4. difficultyTier: PICK EXACTLY ONE from [novice, apprentice, journeyman, expert, master, special].
5. description: 1 short sentence, evocative.
6. bonuses: dict with 1-4 bonus keys from the CONSUMER-VERIFIED bonus allow-list below. Values are floats (percentages as 0.0-1.0). Primary bonus uses tier-primary value; secondaries use tier-secondary range.
7. prerequisites: object with key 'conditions' (array). Each condition has a 'type' and type-specific fields. Pick 1-3 conditions. See CONDITION TYPES below.
8. acquisitionMethod: PICK EXACTLY ONE from [guaranteed_milestone, event_based_rng, special_achievement, hidden_discovery]. Pair with tier: novice→guaranteed_milestone, apprentice..expert→event_based_rng, master→special_achievement, special→hidden_discovery.
9. generationChance: float 0.0-1.0. novice=1.0, apprentice=0.20, journeyman=0.10, expert=0.05, master=0.02, special=1.0.
10. isHidden: boolean. false for all normal titles. true ONLY for difficultyTier='special'.
11. narrative: 2-3 sentences, thematic flavor.

TIER VALUE BANDS (use these for bonus values):
  novice       primary=0.10 secondary=0.00   threshold=50-100      level=none  acquisition=guaranteed_milestone chance=1.00
  apprentice   primary=0.25 secondary=0.05-0.15   threshold=200-1000    level=5     acquisition=event_based_rng      chance=0.20
  journeyman   primary=0.50 secondary=0.10-0.25   threshold=500-5000    level=10    acquisition=event_based_rng      chance=0.10
  expert       primary=1.00 secondary=0.15-0.25   threshold=1000-20000  level=20    acquisition=event_based_rng      chance=0.05
  master       primary=2.00 secondary=0.25-0.50   threshold=5000-100000 level=40    acquisition=special_achievement  chance=0.02
  special      unique-per-title (designer-chosen)  threshold=unique      level=15-25 acquisition=hidden_discovery     chance=1.00 isHidden=true

BONUS ALLOW-LIST (CONSUMER-VERIFIED — these are the bonus field names that code actually reads via get_total_bonus; post-2026-04-24 normalizer resolves camelCase-to-snake_case automatically):
  combat        : attackSpeed, counterChance, criticalChance, meleeDamage, legendaryDropRate, rareDropRate, durabilityBonus, dragonDamage
  crafting      : alchemyQuality, alchemyTime, enchantingQuality, enchantingTime, engineeringQuality, engineeringTime, refiningPrecision, smithingQuality, smithingTime, firstTryBonus, alloyQuality
  gathering     : forestrySpeed, miningSpeed
  fishing       : fishingAccuracy, fishingSpeed, fishingYield, rareFishChance
  utility       : luckStat

(Prefer the bonuses above — they have live consumers. Bonus names outside this list will load as data but silently do nothing at runtime until a consumer is wired up.)

CONDITION TYPES (for prerequisites.conditions array):
  {"type": "level", "min_level": int}
  {"type": "stat_tracker", "stat_path": str (dotted), "min_value": number}
  {"type": "title", "required_title": str} OR {"type": "title", "required_titles": [str]}
  {"type": "skill", "required_skills": [str]}
  {"type": "quest", "required_quests": [str]}
  {"type": "class", "required_class": str}
  {"type": "stat", "stat_name": str (STR/DEF/VIT/LCK/AGI/INT), "min_value": int}

STAT_PATH ALLOW-LIST (verified live paths — new paths need designer review against stat_tracker.py):
  combat_actions.critical_hits
  combat_kills.dragons_killed
  combat_kills.total_kills
  combat_survival.perfect_dodges
  crafting_advanced.consecutive_first_try_bonuses
  crafting_by_discipline.{smithing|refining|alchemy|engineering|enchanting}.total_crafts
  crafting_by_discipline.{smithing|refining|alchemy|engineering|enchanting}.legendary_crafts
  crafting_by_discipline.{smithing|refining|alchemy|engineering|enchanting}.perfect_crafts
  gathering_advanced.legendary_fish_caught
  gathering_advanced.longest_fish_catch_streak
  gathering_advanced.rare_fish_caught
  gathering_totals.fire_resources_gathered
  gathering_totals.total_fish_caught
  gathering_totals.total_ores_mined
  gathering_totals.total_trees_chopped
  item_collection.rare_drops_total

PREREQUISITE CHAINING:
- novice titles: 1 condition (usually stat_tracker).
- apprentice and above: require previous-tier title + level + 1-2 stat_tracker conditions.
- special: unique conditions per title, isHidden=true.

_output.schema_description: {titleId, name, titleType: one of 4, difficultyTier: one of 6, description, bonuses: {consumer-verified keys to floats}, prerequisites: {conditions: [type-keyed objects]}, acquisitionMethod: one of 4, generationChance: 0-1, isHidden: bool, narrative}
_output.example: {"titleId": "apprentice_moors_reaver", "name": "Apprentice Moors Reaver", "titleType": "combat", "difficultyTier": "apprentice", "description": "The moors remember you. Your blade remembers them.", "bonuses": {"meleeDamage": 0.25, "criticalChance": 0.05}, "prerequisites": {"conditions": [{"type": "stat_tracker", "stat_path": "combat_kills.total_kills", "min_value": 500}, {"type": "level", "min_level": 5}]}, "acquisitionMethod": "event_based_rng", "generationChance": 0.20, "isHidden": false, "narrative": "You have cut down enough copperlash riders to know their rhythms in your sleep. The moors answer your arrival with a silence that carries down into the fog."}
